      Overview

      Note:

      When making an API call, you may pass AwsRdsDbInstanceDetails data as a hash:

      {
  associated_roles: [
    {
      role_arn: "NonEmptyString",
      feature_name: "NonEmptyString",
      status: "NonEmptyString",
    },
  ],
  ca_certificate_identifier: "NonEmptyString",
  db_cluster_identifier: "NonEmptyString",
  db_instance_identifier: "NonEmptyString",
  db_instance_class: "NonEmptyString",

      Contains the details of an Amazon RDS DB instance.

      See Also:

      • AWS API Documentation

      Constant Summary

      • SENSITIVE =
        # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8112 
        []

      Instance Attribute Summary

      • #allocated_storage ⇒ Integer rw

        The amount of storage (in gigabytes) to initially allocate for the DB instance.

      • #associated_roles ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbInstanceAssociatedRole> rw

        The AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles associated with the DB instance.

      • #auto_minor_version_upgrade ⇒ Boolean rw

        Indicates whether minor version patches are applied automatically.

      • #availability_zone ⇒ String rw

        The Availability Zone where the DB instance will be created.

      • #backup_retention_period ⇒ Integer rw

        The number of days for which to retain automated backups.

      • #ca_certificate_identifier ⇒ String rw

        The identifier of the CA certificate for this DB instance.

      • #character_set_name ⇒ String rw

        The name of the character set that this DB instance is associated with.

      • #copy_tags_to_snapshot ⇒ Boolean rw

        Whether to copy resource tags to snapshots of the DB instance.

      • #db_cluster_identifier ⇒ String rw

        If the DB instance is a member of a DB cluster, contains the name of the DB cluster that the DB instance is a member of.

      • #db_instance_class ⇒ String rw

        Contains the name of the compute and memory capacity class of the DB instance.

      • #db_instance_identifier ⇒ String rw

        Contains a user-supplied database identifier.

      • #db_instance_port ⇒ Integer rw

        Specifies the port that the DB instance listens on.

      • #db_instance_status ⇒ String rw

        The current status of the DB instance.

      • #db_name ⇒ String rw

        The meaning of this parameter differs according to the database engine you use.

      • #db_parameter_groups ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbParameterGroup> rw

        A list of the DB parameter groups to assign to the DB instance.

      • #db_security_groups ⇒ Array<String> rw

        A list of the DB security groups to assign to the DB instance.

      • #db_subnet_group ⇒ Types::AwsRdsDbSubnetGroup rw

        Information about the subnet group that is associated with the DB instance.

      • #dbi_resource_id ⇒ String rw

        The AWS Region-unique, immutable identifier for the DB instance.

      • #deletion_protection ⇒ Boolean rw

        Indicates whether the DB instance has deletion protection enabled.

      • #domain_memberships ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbDomainMembership> rw

        The Active Directory domain membership records associated with the DB instance.

      • #enabled_cloud_watch_logs_exports ⇒ Array<String> rw

        A list of log types that this DB instance is configured to export to ::Aws::CloudWatch Logs.

      • #endpoint ⇒ Types::AwsRdsDbInstanceEndpoint rw

        Specifies the connection endpoint.

      • #engine ⇒ String rw

        Provides the name of the database engine to use for this DB instance.

      • #engine_version ⇒ String rw

        Indicates the database engine version.

      • #enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn ⇒ String rw

        The ARN of the ::Aws::CloudWatch Logs log stream that receives the enhanced monitoring metrics data for the DB instance.

      • #iam_database_authentication_enabled ⇒ Boolean rw

        True if mapping of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) accounts to database accounts is enabled, and otherwise false.

      • #instance_create_time ⇒ String rw

        Indicates when the DB instance was created.

      • #iops ⇒ Integer rw

        Specifies the provisioned IOPS (I/O operations per second) for this DB instance.

      • #kms_key_id ⇒ String rw

        If StorageEncrypted is true, the AWS KMS key identifier for the encrypted DB instance.

      • #latest_restorable_time ⇒ String rw

        Specifies the latest time to which a database can be restored with point-in-time restore.

      • #license_model ⇒ String rw

        License model information for this DB instance.

      • #listener_endpoint ⇒ Types::AwsRdsDbInstanceEndpoint rw

        Specifies the connection endpoint.

      • #master_username ⇒ String rw

        The master user name of the DB instance.

      • #max_allocated_storage ⇒ Integer rw

        The upper limit to which Amazon RDS can automatically scale the storage of the DB instance.

      • #monitoring_interval ⇒ Integer rw

        The interval, in seconds, between points when enhanced monitoring metrics are collected for the DB instance.

      • #monitoring_role_arn ⇒ String rw

        The ARN for the ::Aws::IAM role that permits Amazon RDS to send enhanced monitoring metrics to ::Aws::CloudWatch Logs.

      • #multi_az ⇒ Boolean rw

        Whether the DB instance is a multiple Availability Zone deployment.

      • #option_group_memberships ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbOptionGroupMembership> rw

        The list of option group memberships for this DB instance.

      • #pending_modified_values ⇒ Types::AwsRdsDbPendingModifiedValues rw

        Changes to the DB instance that are currently pending.

      • #performance_insights_enabled ⇒ Boolean rw

        Indicates whether Performance Insights is enabled for the DB instance.

      • #performance_insights_kms_key_id ⇒ String rw

        The identifier of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the Performance Insights data.

      • #performance_insights_retention_period ⇒ Integer rw

        The number of days to retain Performance Insights data.

      • #preferred_backup_window ⇒ String rw

        The range of time each day when automated backups are created, if automated backups are enabled.

      • #preferred_maintenance_window ⇒ String rw

        The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur, in Universal Coordinated Time (UTC).

      • #processor_features ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbProcessorFeature> rw

        The number of CPU cores and the number of threads per core for the DB instance class of the DB instance.

      • #promotion_tier ⇒ Integer rw

        The order in which to promote an Aurora replica to the primary instance after a failure of the existing primary instance.

      • #publicly_accessible ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies the accessibility options for the DB instance.

      • #read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers ⇒ Array<String> rw

        List of identifiers of Aurora DB clusters to which the ::Aws::RDS DB instance is replicated as a read replica.

      • #read_replica_db_instance_identifiers ⇒ Array<String> rw

        List of identifiers of the read replicas associated with this DB instance.

      • #read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier ⇒ String rw

        If this DB instance is a read replica, contains the identifier of the source DB instance.

      • #secondary_availability_zone ⇒ String rw

        For a DB instance with multi-Availability Zone support, the name of the secondary Availability Zone.

      • #status_infos ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbStatusInfo> rw

        The status of a read replica.

      • #storage_encrypted ⇒ Boolean rw

        Specifies whether the DB instance is encrypted.

      • #storage_type ⇒ String rw

        The storage type for the DB instance.

      • #tde_credential_arn ⇒ String rw

        The ARN from the key store with which the instance is associated for TDE encryption.

      • #timezone ⇒ String rw

        The time zone of the DB instance.

      • #vpc_security_groups ⇒ Array<Types::AwsRdsDbInstanceVpcSecurityGroup> rw

        A list of VPC security groups that the DB instance belongs to.

      Instance Method Summary

      ::Aws::Structure - Included

      #to_hash

      Alias for Aws::Structure#to_h.

      Instance Attribute Details

      #allocated_storage ⇒ Integer (rw)

      The amount of storage (in gigabytes) to initially allocate for the DB instance.

      [ GitHub ] 
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054
      

      
class AwsRdsDbInstanceDetails < Struct.new(
  :associated_roles,
  :ca_certificate_identifier,
  :db_cluster_identifier,
  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :db_instance_port,
  :dbi_resource_id,
  :db_name,
  :deletion_protection,
  :endpoint,
  :engine,
  :engine_version,
  :iam_database_authentication_enabled,
  :instance_create_time,
  :kms_key_id,
  :publicly_accessible,
  :storage_encrypted,
  :tde_credential_arn,
  :vpc_security_groups,
  :multi_az,
  :enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :allocated_storage,
  :preferred_backup_window,
  :backup_retention_period,
  :db_security_groups,
  :db_parameter_groups,
  :availability_zone,
  :db_subnet_group,
  :preferred_maintenance_window,
  :pending_modified_values,
  :latest_restorable_time,
  :auto_minor_version_upgrade,
  :read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier,
  :read_replica_db_instance_identifiers,
  :read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers,
  :license_model,
  :iops,
  :option_group_memberships,
  :character_set_name,
  :secondary_availability_zone,
  :status_infos,
  :storage_type,
  :domain_memberships,
  :copy_tags_to_snapshot,
  :monitoring_interval,
  :monitoring_role_arn,
  :promotion_tier,
  :timezone,
  :performance_insights_enabled,
  :performance_insights_kms_key_id,
  :performance_insights_retention_period,
  :enabled_cloud_watch_logs_exports,
  :processor_features,
  :listener_endpoint,
  :max_allocated_storage)
  SENSITIVE = []
  include Aws::Structure
end

    #db_instance_port  ⇒ Integer  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the port that the DB instance listens on. If the DB
instance is part of a DB cluster, this can be a different port than
the DB cluster port.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #db_name  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The meaning of this parameter differs according to the database
engine you use.
      

      MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, PostgreSQL
      

      Contains the name of the initial database of this instance that was
provided at create time, if one was specified when the DB instance
was created. This same name is returned for the life of the DB
instance.
      

      Oracle
      

      Contains the Oracle System ID (SID) of the created DB instance. Not
shown when the returned parameters do not apply to an Oracle DB
instance.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054

    #db_subnet_group  ⇒ Types::AwsRdsDbSubnetGroup  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Information about the subnet group that is associated with the DB
instance.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054
      

      
class AwsRdsDbInstanceDetails < Struct.new(
  :associated_roles,
  :ca_certificate_identifier,
  :db_cluster_identifier,
  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :db_instance_port,
  :dbi_resource_id,
  :db_name,
  :deletion_protection,
  :endpoint,
  :engine,
  :engine_version,
  :iam_database_authentication_enabled,
  :instance_create_time,
  :kms_key_id,
  :publicly_accessible,
  :storage_encrypted,
  :tde_credential_arn,
  :vpc_security_groups,
  :multi_az,
  :enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :allocated_storage,
  :preferred_backup_window,
  :backup_retention_period,
  :db_security_groups,
  :db_parameter_groups,
  :availability_zone,
  :db_subnet_group,
  :preferred_maintenance_window,
  :pending_modified_values,
  :latest_restorable_time,
  :auto_minor_version_upgrade,
  :read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier,
  :read_replica_db_instance_identifiers,
  :read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers,
  :license_model,
  :iops,
  :option_group_memberships,
  :character_set_name,
  :secondary_availability_zone,
  :status_infos,
  :storage_type,
  :domain_memberships,
  :copy_tags_to_snapshot,
  :monitoring_interval,
  :monitoring_role_arn,
  :promotion_tier,
  :timezone,
  :performance_insights_enabled,
  :performance_insights_kms_key_id,
  :performance_insights_retention_period,
  :enabled_cloud_watch_logs_exports,
  :processor_features,
  :listener_endpoint,
  :max_allocated_storage)
  SENSITIVE = []
  include Aws::Structure
end

      
  
      

      

      


      
  
      
    #dbi_resource_id  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The AWS Region-unique, immutable identifier for the DB instance.
This identifier is found in AWS CloudTrail log entries whenever the
AWS KMS key for the DB instance is accessed.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #deletion_protection  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Indicates whether the DB instance has deletion protection enabled.
      

      When deletion protection is enabled, the database cannot be deleted.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

    #iam_database_authentication_enabled  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      True if mapping of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) accounts
to database accounts is enabled, and otherwise false.
      

      ::Aws::IAM database authentication can be enabled for the following
database engines.
      

        

      • 

        For MySQL 5.6, minor version 5.6.34 or higher
        

        • 

      • 

        For MySQL 5.7, minor version 5.7.16 or higher
        

        • 

      • 

        Aurora 5.6 or higher
        

        • 

      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054

end

      
  
      

      

      


      
  
      
    #instance_create_time  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Indicates when the DB instance was created.
      

      Uses the date-time format specified in RFC 3339 section 5.6,
Internet Date/Time Format. The value cannot contain spaces. For
example, 2020-03-22T13:22:13.933Z.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054

  :associated_roles,
  :ca_certificate_identifier,
  :db_cluster_identifier,
  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :db_instance_port,
  :dbi_resource_id,
  :db_name,
  :deletion_protection,
  :endpoint,
  :engine,
  :engine_version,
  :iam_database_authentication_enabled,
  :instance_create_time,
  :kms_key_id,
  :publicly_accessible,
  :storage_encrypted,
  :tde_credential_arn,
  :vpc_security_groups,
  :multi_az,
  :enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :allocated_storage,
  :preferred_backup_window,
  :backup_retention_period,

    #latest_restorable_time  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the latest time to which a database can be restored with
point-in-time restore.
      

      Uses the date-time format specified in RFC 3339 section 5.6,
Internet Date/Time Format. The value cannot contain spaces. For
example, 2020-03-22T13:22:13.933Z.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

  :associated_roles,
  :ca_certificate_identifier,
  :db_cluster_identifier,
  :db_instance_identifier,
  :db_instance_class,
  :db_instance_port,
  :dbi_resource_id,
  :db_name,
  :deletion_protection,
  :endpoint,
  :engine,
  :engine_version,
  :iam_database_authentication_enabled,
  :instance_create_time,
  :kms_key_id,
  :publicly_accessible,
  :storage_encrypted,
  :tde_credential_arn,
  :vpc_security_groups,
  :multi_az,
  :enhanced_monitoring_resource_arn,
  :db_instance_status,
  :master_username,
  :allocated_storage,
  :preferred_backup_window,
  :backup_retention_period,
  :db_security_groups,
  :db_parameter_groups,
  :availability_zone,
  :db_subnet_group,
  :preferred_maintenance_window,
  :pending_modified_values,
  :latest_restorable_time,
  :auto_minor_version_upgrade,
  :read_replica_source_db_instance_identifier,
  :read_replica_db_instance_identifiers,
  :read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers,
  :license_model,
  :iops,
  :option_group_memberships,
  :character_set_name,
  :secondary_availability_zone,
  :status_infos,
  :storage_type,
  :domain_memberships,
  :copy_tags_to_snapshot,
  :monitoring_interval,
  :monitoring_role_arn,
  :promotion_tier,
  :timezone,
  :performance_insights_enabled,
  :performance_insights_kms_key_id,
  :performance_insights_retention_period,
  :enabled_cloud_watch_logs_exports,
  :processor_features,
  :listener_endpoint,
  :max_allocated_storage)
  SENSITIVE = []
  include Aws::Structure
end

    #preferred_backup_window  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The range of time each day when automated backups are created, if
automated backups are enabled.
      

      Uses the format HH:MM-HH:MM. For example, 04:52-05:22.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

end

      
  
      

      

      


      
  
      
    #preferred_maintenance_window  ⇒ String  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur, in
Universal Coordinated Time (UTC).
      

      Uses the format <day>:HH:MM-<day>:HH:MM.
      

      For the day values, use
mon|tue|wed|thu|fri|sat|sun.
      

      For example, sun:09:32-sun:10:02.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

DB instance class of the DB instance.

    #promotion_tier  ⇒ Integer  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      The order in which to promote an Aurora replica to the primary
instance after a failure of the existing primary instance.

    #publicly_accessible  ⇒ Boolean  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      Specifies the accessibility options for the DB instance.
      

      A value of true specifies an Internet-facing instance with a
publicly resolvable DNS name, which resolves to a public IP address.
      

      A value of false specifies an internal instance with a DNS name that
resolves to a private IP address.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054

    #read_replica_db_cluster_identifiers  ⇒ Array<String>  (rw)
  
      

      
  
      
    
      List of identifiers of Aurora DB clusters to which the ::Aws::RDS DB
instance is replicated as a read replica.
      

  
      

      

      
  

      
  [ GitHub ]

      
  
      
  
      

      # File 'gems/aws-sdk-securityhub/lib/aws-sdk-securityhub/types.rb', line 8054
